column1: Hypertension (Raised Blood pressure or on medication)
Diabetes (Raised Blood Glucose or on medication)
History of Cardiovascular Disease (Heart attack, angina, or stroke)
High 10-Year CVD Risk (Risk ≥20% or existing CVD) among the adult population age 40–69
Cancer Mortality (Proportional mortality from all deaths)
Percentage of target population who always or often consume processed foods high in salt
Current Alcohol Use (Consumed in the past 30 days)
Heavy Episodic Drinking (≥6 drinks on one occasion)
Insufficient Physical Activity (Not meeting WHO recommendations)
